title: equisetum debile var. minus
intro: Equisetum debile var. minus, also known as dwarf horsetail, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Equisetaceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and kidney problems, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Equisetum debile var. minus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve kidney function, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Equisetum debile var. minus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion by infusing the plant material in hot water, allowing for the extraction of its bioactive compounds and utilization of its medicinal properties.
